name: control-mapping freshness gate: every block/pass/auto-demote/auto-restore decision is recorded to the C-4 Merkle-chained audit log
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework nist-csf-2 --control-id GV.OC --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep "control-mapping-gate" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
